releaseBuild.signingNote: Release signing is wired through android/key.properties. The real key.properties file and .jks keystore are gitignored secrets; keep backups outside the repo.

firebaseSetup.command: dart pub global activate flutterfire_cli && flutterfire configure
firebaseSetup.note: App degrades gracefully without Firebase config. Configure before production if you want Analytics, Crashlytics and Remote Config live from day one.

admobSetup.note: Current build still uses Google's test app/ad unit IDs. Replace with real AdMob IDs before a monetized production release.

privacyPolicyNotes: Hosted on GitHub Pages (repo: gandhikishan/puzzle-escape-kaboom; source: hosting/public/privacy.html). Update the contact email in the HTML if needed, then push to redeploy. Can be moved to Firebase Hosting later by re-pointing the same URL constant in lib/core/app_share.dart.
shortDescription: Tap bombs, launch them to the edge, and clear the board!
fullDescription: Puzzle Escape - Kaboom is a relaxing logic puzzle with a satisfying boom. Tap a bomb and watch it slide toward the screen edge or follow a curved path and explode. Plan the order carefully — if another bomb blocks the route, you lose a life. Enjoy packed grids, pinch zoom, hints, three lives per stage, 1200 unique procedural levels, no timers, and family-safe ads.

playConsoleCopyPaste.appAccess: All features are available without login or special access.
playConsoleCopyPaste.contentRatingNotes: No violence, gambling, user-generated content, chat, location sharing, or personal-data collection from users. Cartoon bomb/explosion theme only.

dataTypes: Device or other IDs (Advertising ID) for ads/measurement
App activity (anonymous analytics events if Firebase is configured)
App info and performance (crash logs/diagnostics if Firebase is configured)
securityPractices: Data is encrypted in transit by Google services
Users can reset local game progress in the app
The app does not require account creation
dataSafetySummary.childrenDataNote: Ad requests are configured as child-directed, under-age-of-consent, non-personalized, and max ad content rating G.
